descriptionHeader: Move-In Ready, North-Facing Family Home with Mountain Views
description:

Designed to maximise natural light and mountain views, the home is fully enclosed—ideal for families and pets. The open-plan living and dining area features d a cosy wood burner, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere year-round. 

Stack doors open seamlessly onto a covered entertainment patio with built-in braai, allowing for easy indoor-outdoor living. The contemporary kitchen is both functional and elegant, fitted with Eezi Quartz countertops, quality cabinetry, and a freestanding Bosch oven with integrated extractor—perfect for everyday living and entertaining.

Accommodation includes three generously sized bedrooms, a well-appointed main suite, and a convenient guest toilet. Double automated garage. High-quality finishes throughout ensure a true move-in-ready experience.

descriptionHeader: Stanford 2 Bedroom Cottage for sale
description:
Exclusive sole mandate. This charming and cozy cottage, situated in a peaceful and highly sought-after area of Stanford near the Wandelpad and the river is an ideal choice for permanent living, holiday retreat or a lock-up and go investment property. 

This character-filled home offers a warm and inviting ambiance and properties of this caliber in such an excellent location rarely come on the market.

The ground floor features an open-plan living and dining area centered around a cozy wood burner. The contemporary kitchen is finished with elegant white cabinetry and wood-finish countertops, equipped with a gas hob, integrated electric oven, and air fryer. A separate pantry provides additional storage for larger items. The living space flows seamlessly through doors to a wonderful undercover patio, perfect for enjoying the tranquil, irrigated garden.

The home’s layout includes a spacious en-suite bedroom on the ground floor with built-in cupboards and direct access to an extra-spacious single garage that houses the laundry area. The upper level offers a second bedroom and bathroom, along with an inviting TV room that leads to a large balcony boasting magnificent mountain views. Additional features include a solar geyser, a separate garden shed, and an outdoor shower area.

Let me know if you would like to arrange an appointment to view this exceptional property.

descriptionHeader: Love, Light and Old-World Warmth by the Sea
description:
SOLE MANDATE: Come and experience this captivating home — a place where every corner invites you to slow down, breathe deeply, and truly live. From basking in the golden sun to finding refuge in the soft shade, this is a sanctuary designed for tranquil moments and heartfelt memories. The inviting front stoep, framed by a beautifully manicured garden, completes the picture — this is where you’ll sip morning coffee, watch the day unfold, and feel at peace. With an abundance of love woven into its old-world charm, this residence welcomes you with a warmth that feels like a gentle embrace. It carries whispers of a simpler time — where the scent of freshly baked bread lingers in the air and home feels like a promise kept.

Privately positioned on its erf, the lush garden is a haven of serenity — safe for children and furry friends to roam freely. Inside, the home blends comfort and modernity with effortless grace. Two bedrooms downstairs share a beautiful bathroom featuring an antique cabinet and a classic basin. Upstairs, three additional bedrooms await, including the main suite with its own private balcony — where the soft sea breeze dances through open double doors. The other two bedrooms share a charming bathroom with a slipper bath and another antique vanity — undeniably romantic. The open-plan living areas flow seamlessly between the modern kitchen, dining space, and lounge with a fire place — creating an atmosphere that’s perfect for laughter, conversation, and connection. Elegant touches like a wooden inlay in the floor tiles and a wooden staircase with wrought-iron balustrades add to the home’s timeless character.

A spacious loft room crowns the upper level — the only space where the thatched roof and open trusses are revealed, creating a cozy and creative retreat ideal for working from home or simply unwinding. Wooden floors, doors, and windows complete the story of warmth and authenticity. Move-in ready and completely walled, this home offers comfort, privacy, and charm in equal measure. Conveniently located close to schools, shops, and just a stone’s throw from the beloved cliff path and tidal pools, you’ll enjoy the best of coastal living — morning walks, sunsets by the sea, and the rhythm of life in perfect harmony with nature.

Welcome home — to a place where love lingers, laughter echoes, and every day feels like a new chapter in a beautiful story.

descriptionHeader: Looking to experience a blend of contemporary and country living?
description:
EXCLUSIVE SOLE MANDATE_
Wow!  A very rare find in one of the most desirable locations with its variety of Fauna and Flora and spectacular sunsets. This fully walled, immaculate property with stunning views over the surrounding country, majestic mountains, and Benguela Cove vineyards is situated on an extra-large 3657m² plot. This property offers a compelling picture of a comfortable country and modern functional living. Its extra-large plot offers a landscaped sanctuary that shields you from the hustle and bustle of daily life.  The garden successfully blends nature with the functional and practical comfort of this extraordinary double-story home. Water tanks provide enough water for planting fruit trees and vegetable gardens, or even for keeping some chickens. A property for those looking to experience a blend of contemporary and country living. with simplicity and tranquility. 
Don’t miss the opportunity to make this house your own and enjoy the unique features it has to offer. 

•	10 Panel Solar System 10.4KVA, 
•	Wood-burning Dover stove in the kitchen  
•	Prepaid Electricity  
•	5 JoJo Water tanks ( 20,000 liters) + Borehole
•	Water pumps connected to water tanks & Irrigation 
•	Built-in braai upstairs 
•	Wendy house 3x6 (storeroom)
•	Double Garage plus Workshop with BIC’s
•	Air-conditioned upstairs lounge 
•	All windows have clear burglar bars and roller Blinds
•	Jet Master Fireplace 
•	Fully Alarmed with CCTV
•	4th guest bedroom with toilet hand basin & shower ( Staff quarters) 
•	Lapa area plus many more extras.

Fisherhaven Village is uniquely situated on the Bot River lagoon, which is a protected area, situated within a UNESCO World Heritage Biosphere and earmarked by it as a World Heritage Site. Adjacent to Benguela Cove Wine estate on one side of the village and Middlvlei Nature Reserve and Marine Bird Sanctuary on the other. On the opposite side of the Lagoon is the 5-Star Arabella Golf Estate and Rooisand Nature Reserve, which extends onto miles of unspoiled beaches. 
The magnificent Kogelberg Mountain Range forms a perfect backdrop to the amazing vistas of the surrounding countryside with rolling hills dotted with vineyards and farms. This area is truly "Nature in Perfect Harmony.”

Only 10 minutes from the entrance to the bustling tourist town of Hermanus and less than an hour from CT airport - close proximity to many beaches, wine farms, and golf courses - this eco-sensitive village is ideal for nature lovers; hiking, fishing, and the lagoon is perfectly safe for swimming and most water sports - or just enjoy the amazing bird life and relaxation in a country village.

descriptionHeader: Architectural Designer Home - for the buyer seeking something truly unique.
description:
This exceptional, exclusively marketed,  architectural design home is a true  work of art rather than a conventional residence.  Perfectly positioned on a corner plot.  Every element has been thoughtfully curated, resulting in a home that celebrates design, light, space, and views.
Downstairs, a large family room with an integrated dining area is enhanced by a striking built-in bookcase, creating a warm yet contemporary living space. The spacious downstairs bedroom offers extraordinary built-in cupboards, while a smaller children’s bedroom with built0in bunk beds is ideal for family living or guests. A well-appointed bathroom completes this level.
This level also features a separate laundry room with an adjoining storeroom, offering excellent practicality without compromising on style. The laundry opens onto a private, sheltered drying yard, thoughtfully designed as part of the home’s architectural concept — functional, discreet, and beautifully integrated.

The solid staircase leads upstairs to a light-filled open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area, perfectly suited for entertaining.  A fireplace in the living area is well positioned to enjoy on colder evenings.  The kitchen is complemented by a separate scullery, maintaining clean lines and uncluttered spaces. Stackable doors open seamlessly onto a patio with a built-in braai, where spectacular sea and mountain views frame everyday living.
The upstairs main bedroom is a serene retreat with an en-suite bathroom, walk-in closet and magnificent mountain views. An additional extra-large bedroom and a guest bathroom complete the upper level, offering generous accommodation for family and visitors.
This one-of-a-kind Pringle Bay home is ideal as a permanent residence, luxury holiday home, or investment property, combining architectural excellence, coastal charm, and remarkable views.
For buyers seeking something truly unique, this architectural masterpiece offers a lifestyle as inspiring as the home itself.

Double doors open onto a covered patio with a built in braai and sweeping views, creating an exceptional setting for relaxed entertaining and outdoor living. The open plan kitchen is both practical and inviting, fitted with granite countertops and ample cabinetry, seamlessly connecting to the living areas for easy everyday living.

Additional comforts include an automated double garage with direct access into the home, a private garden positioned in a quiet street, fibre connectivity, and an inverter with battery backup for peace of mind.

Residents enjoy access to an impressive range of estate facilities including a clubhouse with a fully staffed bar, landscaped outdoor areas and braai facilities, an Olympic size swimming pool, steam room, a fully equipped gym with individual saunas, as well as squash and tennis courts.

This home presents a compelling opportunity for buyers seeking a secure lifestyle investment within one of the regions most sought after estates.

descriptionHeader: Elegant, modern double-storey home with sea and mountain views  -  kleinbaai
description:
This brand-new, state-of-the-art double-storey home offers elegant design, quality finishes, and an abundance of natural light, perfectly positioned in the sought-after Duikersfontein Development, Kleinbaai.

The ground floor welcomes you with a stylish entrance hall offering direct access to a double garage.  This level features two spacious bedrooms, both with en-suite bathrooms and ample built-in cupboard space, as well as a dedicated laundry room. A comfortable, well-designed staircase leads to the upper level.

The upper floor boasts a generous open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area, finished with modern, high-quality fittings. A wood-burning stove adds warmth and character to the living space, which opens through sliding doors onto a balcony with breathtaking sea views, a refreshing ocean breeze, and beautiful mountain vistas. The upstairs master bedroom features a separate dressing area and a sleek, beautifully appointed full en-suite bathroom with both bath and shower.

The property is complemented by a well-maintained garden with ample space for future additions, offering excellent potential for long-term capital growth.

Duikersfontein is part of Kleinbaai and falls under a Homeowners’ Association with a minimal levy of R2,400 per year. The home is ideally located within short walking distance of the ocean and golf course (approximately 100 metres).

Kleinbaai is renowned for its small harbour, where boats launch for shark cage diving, whale watching, and fishing. The village offers a restaurant, small superette, and petrol station, all within walking distance, and is known for its friendly community atmosphere.

All furniture and furnishings can be included in the sale at an additional price.

descriptionHeader: 4 Bedroom New House in Kleinmond
description:
A newly build house in Mountain Avenues with top quality finishes. It is centrally located and walking distance to all shops, beach, mountain and golf course. The house is an entertainers dream, large open plan living areas fitted with vinyl floors. Walking through the large sliding doors you will find an outdoor braai with a large patio and mountain views. There are four bedrooms fitted with lots of cupboards. The kitchen is fitted with a Defy oven ,hob and Elica Extractor fan. The kitchen has lots of cupboards and an island fitted with Eezi Quartz tops and in the scullery there are a double underslung Franki basin and Meissen taps.  The house has 1 full en-suite,1 guest bathroom and another en-suite batroom. Fibre is already installed with a router and the Wifi is on a 24 month contract that needs to be transferred onto the new owner's name. There is an alarm system that is enabled on the wifi and can be controlled with remotes or via app on your phone. The 200l geyser is connected to a Heat pump that is low on energy.  Bonus is free water for your grass and connect your own water pump to water line in storm water pipe.. The sewerage is connected to a septic tank.
 The double garage is larger than average and have Aluminium doors that can be operated with remotes or via an app on cellphone. The plot is also larger than your average plot in Kleinmond.  House is NHBRC registered.
The db is solar/inverter ready, so the owner can add a solar system easily to the DB board for an added cost, depending on the size of the system needed.
Galvanised gates still needs to be fitted on front wall 
Kleinmond is situated in the heart of the Cape Floral kingdom and is surrounded by the Kogelberg Biosphere Reserve (containing 1 400 species of fynbos) which is the first Biosphere in South Africa to be proclaimed by United Nations’ Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO). There are over 1 500 different plant species here, 150 of which are endemic, occurring nowhere else in the world.

descriptionHeader: Endless Horizons

Whale watching, hiking, swimming, freshwater cave exploration, and 4x4 trails are just some of the attractions you'll find in De Kelders. Neighbouring the marine tourism hub of Gansbaai, it is perfectly placed to offer the ultimate seaside holiday.

descriptionHeader: 2 Bedroom House for sale in Greyton
description:
This property is being sold by the owner.
Kindly note that we are not appointing estate agents at this time.
The property has 2 freestanding studios and a greenhouse on it.
Each studio has its own street entrance.
Our off grid Mountain Studio is on top of the rocky hill overlooking the Riviersonderend Mountain range's Uitkykkop in the north with nothing but fynbos in between and overlooking Greyton and the distant canola and fruit farms in the south. 
This studio is 85,8 square meters with two porches running end to end on each of the north and south sides.
This studio has a fireplace, waterproof vinyl tong and groove flooring, spot lights, blinds, security bars, bath / shower / toilet and full kitchen.
There is a storeroom beneath the studio.
This studio is off the grid, equipped with a Sunsynk solar system with 2 batteries and 10 panels that provides for the studio's power requirements throughout the year. 
It also has a solar geyser.
There are 3 X 1000 litre water tanks installed on the east side of the studio.
The garden in front of this studio is wild fynbos with only a path through it to the top gate that joins onto the Greyton hiking and MTB trails.
The Mountain Studio was designed and built by Going Green Modular Building Solutions Pty Ltd. 
This modular approach was purposefully done for a light footprint as the structure could be disassembled and moved or sold, if necessary or added onto due to the modular nature.

The Garden Studio is in the beautiful garden at the bottom of the property. 
This studio is 36 square meters with a porch running end to end on the east side of the studio.
This studio has a pattern tiled floor, lights, blinds and curtains, security bars,  shower / toilet and kitchenette.
There is an outside wash basin, tap and a 1000 litre water tank on the west side.
This studio has its own private garden with a fireplace and seating area.
It is rented on a daily rate on AirBnB and Booking com.
The Garden Studio is built from bricks and mortar.

Between the two studios is a 4m X 6m greenhouse with two 1m X 6m raised beds on each side with 6 air vents and two double doors on each end.

The property is fenced in with two gates at the bottom, one per studio and a pedestrian gate at the top leading onto the hiking trails.

Greyton is a wonderful peaceful but lively colourful artistic community with weekly organic veg and craft markets. Greyton hosts many annual festivals and many local and international weekend tourists visit all year round.
Winter often brings snow on the mountains and the village is often covered in breathtaking misty mornings.
The village is surrounded by nature with many hiking and MTB trails to chose from.
This property has 855 sqm of no development zone that you have exclusive use over and 1666 sqm of development zone that you have full title over.

Disclaimer: While every effort has been made in preparation of this listing, the seller cannot accept liability for any error and/or omission.

descriptionHeader: Spacious Coastal Residence with Ocean Outlook
description:
This contemporary and well-maintained home is located in a quiet cul-de-sac in Agulhas and enjoys elevated positioning with views of the ocean and the Zoetendalsrug mountain range. Designed with space, comfort, and functionality in mind, the property is ideal for family living or use as a holiday residence.

Entry is through a striking artistic blue front door into a spacious entrance hall. The ground floor offers a well-sized bedroom with a en-suite bathroom, along with a separate guest bathroom. The open-plan living and dining areas connect seamlessly to a modern, well-appointed kitchen designed for both everyday use and entertaining. Kitchen features include white granite countertops, a butler sink, a blue centre island, and a freestanding gas stove with electric oven, which is included in the sale. Installed above the stove is a unique pot filler tap, providing added ease and convenience while cooking. Also included in the sale are the double-door fridge, microwave, and two loose-standing wooden cupboards located in the scullery. A dedicated coffee station and a separate scullery with ample storage further enhance the kitchen’s practicality.

The adjacent laundry room is fitted with a double basin and a built-in ironing board, making daily laundry tasks efficient and convenient. From here, access is provided to a private courtyard. The expansive living area opens onto a covered braai patio overlooking a neatly maintained garden, creating an inviting space for entertaining and family gatherings. Modern light fittings and quality architectural finishes are evident throughout the home.

The upper level offers a spacious second lounge with kitchenette and fireplace, providing an additional living area with excellent sea views. The main bedroom is generously proportioned and features a walk-in closet and a full en-suite bathroom. Patio doors from both the main bedroom and the upstairs lounge lead onto a balcony with open ocean views. A third bedroom, also en-suite, completes the accommodation on this level.

Additional features include a double automated garage, pre-paid electricity, paved surrounds, two 1,000-litre Roto water tanks, and a newly installed solar geyser with a five-year warranty.

This property offers modern finishes, thoughtful extras, and a well-planned layout in a desirable coastal location, making it suitable for permanent living or a lock-up-and-go holiday home.

descriptionHeader: Location! Beautiful sea views.

Occupation nor registration can take place before 1 May 2026!

Cozy up by the fireplace when the evening chill rolls in, then step onto the balcony where the real show begins: endless ocean, dramatic mountains, and skies that never repeat themselves.

The two upstairs bedrooms understand the assignment. The master suite? Pure indulgence ,ensuite bathroom, private balcony access, and those wake-up-to-the-waves views that'll ruin you for ordinary mornings forever. The second bedroom is equally generous with built-ins, plush carpets, and yes, more of those sea views you'll never tire of.

The practical touches matter too: inverter backup for uninterrupted holiday fun, comprehensive security for peace of mind, two garages, and a built-in braai for starlit storytelling sessions that'll become family legend.

This is more than a holiday home. It's where your family exhales, reconnects, and remembers what matters. Sandbaai is calling will you answer?

descriptionHeader: Where Ocean Views Meet Timeless Elegance
description:
Sole Mandate. From the moment you cross the threshold, a sense of refined luxury envelops you as a magnificent chandelier illuminates the entrance hallway, setting the tone for the exquisite spaces that await. This upper-level retreat features an open-plan layout that draws you toward the fireplace on crisp winter evenings, while expansive windows frame breathtaking mountain and ocean vistas that remind you why this corner of the world is so special. A feature fireplace adds warmth and ambiance, while generous sliding doors dissolve the boundaries between indoor and outdoor living, leading to an expansive entertainment room with stacking doors that open completely to the beautifully landscaped garden. The kitchen is a chef's dream, boasting a statement center island, abundant storage, elegant granite countertops, and the practical luxury of a separate scullery and pantry. The master suite offers a private sanctuary with a spa-like ensuite bathroom featuring dual basins, air conditioning for year-round comfort, and a walk-in closet that speaks to sophisticated living.
Beyond the interiors, this remarkable property continues to delight with a private backyard oasis —your personal retreat after long days—while solar panels demonstrate a commitment to sustainable, forward-thinking living. With a conveniently located garage and five thoughtfully appointed bedrooms, this Sandbaai gem offers the rare combination of modern luxury, practical family living, and that intangible magic that transforms a house into a forever home. This is where your story begins.

For the adventurous, the nearby dam offers opportunities for water sports, fishing, and tranquil forest hikes, where encounters with local wildlife add to the charm.

descriptionHeader: Heritage Gem on Sarel Cilliers Street R316 Napier Home, Restaurant, or Business
description:
Sole Mandate: Step into a storybook setting that has already graced the pages of lifestyle magazines - a rare heritage treasure that whispers of romance, history, and endless possibility.

Perfectly positioned along the R316 - the scenic route to Cape Agulhas and the Overberg - this Napier landmark has long welcomed visitors as a fine dining destination. Once a beloved home, it now opens its doors to your imagination: continue its culinary legacy, reinvent it as an enchanting residence, curate an art gallery, or craft a boutique guest retreat.

Two Character Properties

Behind its historic façade, you'll discover a world where old-world romance meets modern comfort. The main cottage is infused with French country charm - soft light spilling through generous windows, rustic screeded floors that have stood the test of time, and cozy nooks that invite you to linger.

The heart of the home is warmed by a grand fireplace, while an open-plan lounge and kitchen embrace conviviality. French doors open to an enclosed braai room, echoing the spirit of long, leisurely gatherings. A rustic mudroom welcomes you at the rear entrance - practical yet irresistibly quaint. Outdoors, a leafy courtyard offers a private al fresco dining nook, perfect for evenings under strings of fairy lights and starlit skies.

The boudoir is imbued with rustic romance - a space where you can imagine soft linen, flickering candles, and mornings filled with golden light. A spacious bathroom adds indulgence, while the north-facing study (or second bedroom) gazes out over the garden, catching the sun throughout the day.

The Restaurant

Step inside and be transported to the pages of a French country novel, where stone walls and timber beams set the scene for an atmosphere steeped in history and romance. What was once a cherished private residence has, over the years, blossomed into a charming bistro that has welcomed friends, travelers, and dreamers alike.

There's a sense of intimacy in every corner - the glow of a fireplace in winter, the dappled light that dances across polished wooden floors, the gentle creak of old doors that hold the stories of decades past. French doors open onto sheltered courtyards, inviting the scent of herbs and roses to drift inside, blurring the line between home and garden.

Here, old-world charm is woven into every detail: rustic beams overhead, cosy nooks for quiet conversation, and generous windows framing village life beyond. By evening, it becomes a stage for romance - soft candlelight, the clink of wine glasses, and the easy laughter of good company.

And yet, this enchanting space is far more than it appears. With its adaptable layout, it can once again return to being a home or reinvent itself to host your creative vision - be it a gallery, guest retreat, boutique studio, or artisanal kitchen. Like all great French country homes, it bends gracefully to its purpose, always retaining its soul.

The Winery - A Double-Volume Showstopper

Once home to barrels of rich, full-bodied wines, the winery now offers soaring proportions and endless possibilities. Its dramatic scale invites reinvention: perhaps as a gallery alive with creativity, a studio, or a destination for intimate gatherings beneath its lofty beams.

A Garden Worth Pausing For

The garden is a dream in itself - a French country tableau of clipped symmetry and textured greenery softened by fragrant blooms and whispering trees. Wander along gravel paths, pause by the old stone walls, and listen as the river traces its way along the boundary  - a gentle soundtrack to your days. Beyond, the view stretches to paddocks where horses graze and rolling fields shift with the colours of the seasons.

This is not just a property - it is a canvas of character and romance, ready to be reimagined in your hands - your dream of a home, a business, or both, this heritage haven in the heart of Napier is ready for its next love story.

Exclusive Mandate: Discover the unparalleled potential awaiting you in this generously sized home, perfectly situated on the highly sought-after Ocean View Drive in Struisbaai. If location is everything, this is your chance to acquire a property in one of the most desirable coastal positions.

This unique property is perfectly designed for versatile living or as a lucrative holiday rental investment. Its clever layout is divided into three separate sections, offering privacy and flexibility:

Main Dwelling: Features a spacious lounge, full kitchen, dedicated braai room, and two bedrooms, each with its own ensuite bathroom. Embrace the indoor-outdoor lifestyle with two built-in braai areas and an abundance of spacious balcony areas. These expansive balconies are perfect for enjoying the sea air and sunsets, and also represent a key future asset—they offer the potential for future expansion to increase the home's footprint and value!

Second Section: Private entrance, a separate room, kitchenette, and a bathroom. 

Third (Bottom) Section next to the double garage: Separate entrance, kitchenette, and a bathroom.

These self-contained units make it an ideal setup for rental income or accommodating extended family and guests!

While this beloved home is in an older condition it is priced to reflect the opportunity. This is your chance to acquire a premium address and renovate to your exact taste, transforming it into your dream coastal retreat or a modern, high-yield investment property.

Don't miss out on this rare chance to invest in Ocean View Drive and create the coastal masterpiece you've always dreamed of!

descriptionHeader: Immaculate hidden gem with garden flat
description:
EXCLUSIVE MANDATE:
This bright and airy home is a true hidden gem, combining modern comfort with thoughtful extras.
The open-plan living area offers seamless flow between the lounge with a gas fireplace, dining area, and a well-appointed kitchen featuring a pantry, Smeg stove, prep bowl, and easy access to the scullery and laundry, both fitted with ample built-in storage.

Built with a Nu-Tec structure on a solid foundation, the home is exceptionally well-insulated for year-round comfort. Enjoy beautiful mountain views from the wrap-around verandah that overlooks the established garden.

The main en-suite bedroom boasts a walk-through dressing room with generous cupboard space and a luxurious full bathroom. The second bedroom is served by a stylish guest bathroom.
A separate garden flat provides ideal accommodation for guests, extended family, or rental income. It features a kitchen with breakfast counter, bathroom, loft bedroom, air conditioning, private Wi-Fi, and its own secluded garden area.

Additional features include:
•	Double garage and spacious 48m2 workshop with its own bathroom — perfect for a hobbyist or handyman
•	Undercover carport
•	Two aluminium garden sheds and three water storage tanks
•	Space for a vegetable garden

Modern conveniences throughout:
•	7.5 kW solar system with 2 batteries and 8 panels
•	Fibre internet connection
•	Two air conditioners
•	Comprehensive alarm system
•	Blinds fitted to all windows

The property is fully enclosed, with a paved driveway and electronic entrance gate, offering both privacy and peace of mind. A  truly immaculate home offering comfort, sustainability, and versatility — ready to move in and enjoy.

descriptionHeader: Your hidden gem in Fernwood Villas Chanteclair
description:
EXCLUSIVE SOLE MANDATE: At the end of a quiet cul-de-sac, tucked away in the sought-after Fernwood Villas, lies a home where comfort, elegance, and peace come together effortlessly. You will immediately feel the calm of the thoughtfully designed home, where every fixture and fitting is top quality. The layout is ideal for privacy, with two north-facing en-suite bedrooms positioned on opposite sides of the home. Each room is bathed in golden sunlight, creating warmth and serenity from morning to evening.

Complemented by a beautifully modern kitchen, complete with Caesarstone countertops, ample cupboards, and a separate scullery. Its open-plan flow to the double-volume living areas creates both ease and atmosphere. Exposed trusses add a sense of space, while a wood-burning fireplace invites cozy evenings. For year-round enjoyment, the enclosed patio with sliding doors has been transformed into a delightful indoor braai area—perfect for gathering with friends or enjoying quiet nights in.

Light streams through generous windows, filling the home with brightness and life. A small, charming garden envelopes the home—easy to maintain yet big enough to plant herbs or nurture your favourite blooms. Additional features include a double garage with direct access into the home, aluminium windows throughout, tiled roofing, and the option to keep a small pet. This is a property designed for peace of mind—safe, secure, and the perfect lock-up-and-go without compromising on charm. Whether you’re searching for a permanent residence, a holiday retreat, or a downscale option that still feels luxurious, this home will capture your heart.

descriptionHeader: Spacious 5-Bedroom Family Home with Dual Living Options and Breath-taking Views – Klipfontein Estate, Kleinbaai
description:
Mandate to Sell | Presented by Stefan Joubert – RE/MAX Wine and Whales

Discover the perfect blend of space, comfort, and coastal charm in this beautifully designed double-storey home located in the sought-after Klipfontein Estate, Kleinbaai. Situated at 3 Bester Crescent on a 620m² erf, this property offers stunning mountain and sea views, versatile living options, and modern convenience – ideal for families, dual-living setups, or investment buyers.
The upper level welcomes you with a spacious entrance hall leading into an expansive open-plan kitchen, dining, and living area with a built-in braai and balcony – perfect for entertaining while enjoying the sea breeze. This floor includes three bedrooms and two bathrooms, two of which offer distant ocean views. The kitchen features ample workspace and storage, seamlessly connecting to the bright living areas.
Downstairs, a self-contained flatlet provides excellent flexibility for extended family, guests, or potential rental income. It offers one bedroom, a bathroom, kitchenette, and living area. The fifth bedroom, also on the lower level, can easily be incorporated into the flatlet or remain part of the main house depending on your needs.
Additional features include a double garage, store room, outdoor braai and basin area, burglar bars, and an alarm system for peace of mind. The property backs onto a serene green belt, offering uninterrupted mountain views and enhanced privacy.
Klipfontein Estate is a tranquil and secure area known for its beautiful natural surroundings, close proximity to Franskraal Beach, and easy access to Gansbaai's amenities, schools, and restaurants.
Enjoy the best of coastal living in Kleinbaai – a home that combines space, security, and spectacular scenery.

descriptionHeader: Large Residential Home in Stanford’s Heritage Area
description:
A rare opportunity to purchase a spacious property on a 1 518 m² erf in the heart of the village. Large plots of this size seldom become available, especially in such a central location.

The home offers three bedrooms, three bathrooms, a very large living room, an old farm-style kitchen with walk-in pantry, and a versatile workroom/office/playroom. The expansive back garden enjoys beautiful mountain views.

A separate studio apartment with its own courtyard provides additional accommodation, and there are multiple outbuildings and storerooms.

Background:
This property is one of Stanford’s historic landmarks. It originally served as the village police station, magistrate’s court and residence of the police chief. The old jail cells still stand at the rear of the property, adding to its heritage value.

A significant village property with exceptional potential for renovation and restoration.
